svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="hand-embedded"> <diagram id="arch" name="Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1115" dy="486" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="browser" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Browser" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="120" x="29" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloudfront" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="CloudFront" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="140" x="219" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0ea5e9;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="S3 (private)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="549" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="apigw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="API Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="140" x="219" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="apilambda" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#f59e0b;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="API Lambda" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="160" x="389" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ddb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0ea5e9;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="DynamoDB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="140" x="659" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sqs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0ea5e9;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="SQS Queue + DLQ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="160" x="389" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#f59e0b;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="Worker Lambda" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="639" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="browser" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;startArrow=none;startFill=0;" target="cloudfront" value="load SPA (Single-Page application)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0001" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="cloudfront" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" target="s3" value="OAC (Origin Access Control)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="browser" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" target="apigw" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="apigw" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" target="apilambda" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="apilambda" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;endFill=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ddb" value="read tasks<div>statuses</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0058" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="569" y="210" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="659" y="210" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="apilambda" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" target="sqs" value="send new task"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0088" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="sqs" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" target="worker" value="trigger"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="worker" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" target="ddb" value="1) Upon receiving a task, update its&nbsp;<div>status to "in progress<span style="background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">"</span><div><div>2) After finishing a task, update</div><div>its status to "Completed" and save result</div></div></div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0088" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vmBierAk1z1QhoCTsUgi-1" edge="1" parent="1" source="apilambda" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;startArrow=none;startFill=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.75;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ddb" value="add new<div>"pending" task</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0058" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="609" y="280" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="699" y="280" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
1) Upon receiving a task, update its
status to "in progress"
2) After finishing a task, update
its status to "Completed" and save result
